title: Fermented Juicy Romantic Spanish Tomato Stir-fry
description: This fermented, juicy, and romantic Spanish dish combines fresh tomatoes with vegetable shortening for a unique flavor profile that's perfect for those looking to add some creativity into their paleo-friendly meals.
instructions: Heat vegetable shortening in a pan over medium heat.
Add finely chopped red onion and sauté for about 2 minutes until softened.
Add minced garlic and cook for another minute or two.
Pierce tomatoes with the tip of a knife to release juices. Add them to the pan along with the lime juice.
Stir-fry everything together for about 5-7 minutes, ensuring that the tomatoes are slightly broken up but still retaining their shape.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.
